series_metadata.series_title: Applications for DLs, IDs, and TIPICs.
series_metadata.series_description: The contents of this record series include applications, supplementary forms, and all supporting documents created and received during deputy registrar transactions for Ohio driver''s licenses, state identification cards, and temporary instruction permit identification cards.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Four years from the date of the record or transaction, whichever is later. ; Electronic: Twelve years from the date of the record or transaction, whichever is later., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
